prompt:
A professional, highly polished double-exposure portrait composition featuring a young South Asian man.
Background Element: A large, faded close-up portrait of his face, smiling warmly, looking slightly off-camera with a well-groomed modern hairstyle and a neatly trimmed beard.
Foreground Element: A full-body sitting pose of the same man in sharp focus, sitting confidently on a ledge. He is wearing stylish black rectangular sunglasses, a crisp white short-sleeve button-down shirt, tailored gray trousers, a modern smartwatch, and black loafers. Minimalist linework tattoos are visible on his forearms.
Setting & Atmosphere: The scene is set against a soft sunset sky with a smooth gradient of warm pastel orange, pink, and light purple tones. A small flock of birds is flying in the distant sky. Cinematic, artistic lighting with soft highlights that create a clean, high-fashion social media poster aesthetic. Studio quality, 8k resolution, photorealistic digital art.
